title: neottia wardii
intro: Neottia wardii, also known as the Chinese orchid or Chinese ladies' tresses, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Neottia wardii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
